title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts - Tab UI
scenario: Notifications & Device Alerts tab UI under General settings does not match Figma design
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the menu icon or settings gear to access Settings.
Tap on the Notifications tab (or Notifications & Device Alerts).
Observe the UI elements, layout, and available options on the screen.
expected: The Notifications & Device Alerts screen UI matches the Figma design in terms of layout, labels, toggles, and styling.
